import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update platform"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/meshobjects/meshplatforms/66feeb14-b0f3-460f-9ee9-694d6c565385"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



,
                Update an existing meshPlatform by its UUID. WARNING: Please note that changing certain attributes like
                platform configuration can have serious consequences for existing tenants and ongoing operations.
                Changes to platform configuration may disrupt tenant replication processes, metering data collection,
                user access to platform tenants, and building block operations. Proceed with caution and ensure you
                test your changes after applying them.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"Content-Type","in":"header","description":"This endpoint of meshObject API is individually <<versioning,versioned>>. Use `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshplatform.v1.hal+json` for this version of the endpoint.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshplatform.v1.hal+json"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshplatform.v1.hal+json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","title":"api-meshobjects-meshplatforms-66feeb14-b0f3-460f-9ee9-694d6c565385486549215"},"examples":{"meshPlatformV1Put":{"value":"{\n  \"apiVersion\": \"v1\",\n  \"kind\": \"meshPlatform\",\n  \"metadata\": {\n    \"uuid\": \"66feeb14-b0f3-460f-9ee9-694d6c565385\",\n    \"name\": \"azure-aks-prod\",\n    \"ownedByWorkspace\": \"mobile-app-team\"\n  },\n  \"spec\": {\n    \"displayName\": \"Azure AKS Production Updated\",\n    \"description\": \"Updated Azure production environment\",\n    \"endpoint\": \"https://portal.azure.com\",\n    \"supportUrl\": \"https://support.azure.com\",\n    \"documentationUrl\": \"https://docs.azure.com\",\n    \"locationRef\": {\n      \"meshKind\": \"meshLocation\",\n      \"identifier\": \"azure-prod\"\n    },\n    \"contributingWorkspaces\": [],\n    \"availability\": {\n      \"restriction\": \"RESTRICTED\",\n      \"marketplaceStatus\": \"PUBLISHED\",\n      \"restrictedToWorkspaces\": [\"mobile-app-team\"]\n    },\n    \"config\": {\n      \"type\": \"aks\",\n      \"aks\": {\n        \"baseUrl\": \"https://management.azure.com\",\n        \"disableSslValidation\": false,\n        \"replication\": null\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"200","content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshplatform.v1.hal+json":{"schema":{"title":"meshPlatformV1Put","type":"object"},"examples":{"meshPlatformV1Put":{"value":"{\n  \"kind\" : \"meshPlatform\",\n  \"apiVersion\" : \"v1\",\n  \"metadata\" : {\n    \"name\" : \"azure-aks-prod\",\n    \"ownedByWorkspace\" : \"mobile-app-team\",\n    \"uuid\" : \"66feeb14-b0f3-460f-9ee9-694d6c565385\"\n  },\n  \"spec\" : {\n    \"locationRef\" : {\n      \"identifier\" : \"azure-prod\",\n      \"kind\" : \"meshLocation\"\n    },\n    \"displayName\" : \"Azure AKS Production Updated\",\n    \"description\" : \"Updated Azure production environment\",\n    \"endpoint\" : \"https://portal.azure.com\",\n    \"supportUrl\" : \"https://support.azure.com\",\n    \"documentationUrl\" : \"https://docs.azure.com\",\n    \"availability\" : {\n      \"restriction\" : \"RESTRICTED\",\n      \"restrictedToWorkspaces\" : [ \"mobile-app-team\" ],\n      \"marketplaceStatus\" : \"PUBLISHED\"\n    },\n    \"config\" : {\n      \"type\" : \"aks\",\n      \"aks\" : {\n        \"baseUrl\" : \"https://management.azure.com\",\n        \"disableSslValidation\" : false\n      }\n    },\n    \"contributingWorkspaces\" : [ ]\n  },\n  \"status\" : {\n    \"metering\" : \"NOT_DEFINED\",\n    \"marketPlace\" : {\n      \"status\" : \"PUBLISHED\"\n    },\n    \"platform\" : \"ACTIVE\"\n  },\n  \"_links\" : {\n    \"self\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects/meshplatforms/66feeb14-b0f3-460f-9ee9-694d6c565385\"\n    },\n    \"owner\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects/meshworkspaces/mobile-app-team\"\n    }\n  }\n}"}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
